en: Then do it. I don't want you to be unhappy.
ko: 그걸 알면 행동해. 나는 네가 불행하길 원하지 않아.

en: I need to tell you something. I know.
Just tell me, is it almost over?
I don't know how much longer I can...
ko: 나는 얼마나 더 버틸 수 있을지 모르겠어.

en: I can tell you how sorry and ashamed I am.
ko: 내가 얼마나 미안하고 부끄러운지 말해줄 수 있어.

en: I thought I could do it.
ko: 나는 할 수 있을 거라고 생각했어.

en: I thought I could be the guy that I told you I was going to be.
ko: 내가 말했던 그런 사람이 될 수 있을 거라고 생각했어.

en: And then somewhere along the way...
I thought I was losing you.
I got lost. It's a confusing world out there,
and who I am got messed up for a minute.
And now I'm watching you, ready to give all this up for me?
ko: 그리고 지금 너는 나를 위해 모든 것을 포기할 준비가 되어 있어?

en: I will not let that happen.
ko: 나는 그렇게 되도록 두지 않을 거야.
